# seerr_current_user (Data Source)

Get information about the currently authenticated Seerr user via the `/api/v1/auth/me` endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) The email address of the current user.
- `id` (String) The ID of the current user.
- `permissions` (Number) Permissions bitmask for the current user.
- `username` (String) The username of the current user.
